title: helichrysum rosum var. arcuatum
intro: Helichrysum rosum var. arcuatum, also known as the Rock Helichrysum, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family with a distinct appearance of silvery leaves and white flowers. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum rosum var. arcuatum are attributed to its high levels of sesquiterpene compounds, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum rosum var. arcuatum can be prepared as an essential oil, which is used in aromatherapy, and also as a tea or tincture for internal use, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
